physical_interaction_definition:
Given that physical interaction is defined as any form of direct bodily contact between two people, it encompasses any instance where any part of their bodies comes into physical contact.

Considering that physical interaction refers to any type of direct contact involving the body between two individuals, it includes any occasion where any part of their bodies physically touches.

Given that physical interaction denotes any direct contact between two people's bodies, it covers every situation where any body part of one person touches another.

Since physical interaction is defined as any instance of direct bodily connection between two individuals, it covers all scenarios where any part of their bodies comes into contact.

Physical interaction, as defined, entails any direct bodily contact between two individuals, capturing any moment when any part of their bodies makes physical contact.

Given that physical interaction represents any form of direct body contact between two people, it accounts for every case where any of their body parts touch each other.
